title: Mentor Guide — Day 7 — Field Research & Market Exchange
coachingObjective: Coach field interview discipline and squad evidence sharing at the Market Intelligence Exchange.

timing.preSession: Check squad interview count in mentor dashboard
timing.duringSession: Roam during field research AM; attend exchange PM

discussionQuestions: What surprised your squad most from the field?
Which assumption changed after today's interviews?
What customer quote will stick with the squad?
observationAreas: Interview encoding quality in Discover mode
Squad participation in Market Intelligence Exchange
coachingTips: Push for minimum 3 encoded interviews before exchange
Celebrate resilience after rejection in the field
Reinforce squad-shared evidence — not individual competition
reflectionPrompts: What pattern are you beginning to notice?

activityCoachingNotes.notes: 3 interviews per member · 9 per squad target.
7 min per squad · no PowerPoint required.
